stemHtml: Cleared to FL100 (flight plan says FL310) in procedural airspace. You can't reach ATC. After squawking 7600, you should...

options.a: Remain at FL100 for 20 minutes then follow the flight plan.
options.b: Climb immediately per the flight plan.
options.c: Remain at FL100 for 1 minute then follow the flight plan.
options.d: Remain at FL100 for 10 minutes then follow the flight plan.
